description: Indirect-object identification prompts with the referenced name as the final behavior token.

documents.text:
Read the sentence and name the indirect object.
Sentence: Alice gave the book to Bob.
Indirect object: Bob

Read the sentence and name the indirect object.
Sentence: Maria sent the letter to Daniel.
Indirect object: Daniel

Read the sentence and name the indirect object.
Sentence: Priya handed the keys to Omar.
Indirect object: Omar

Read the sentence and name the indirect object.
Sentence: Liam showed the picture to Nora.
Indirect object: Nora
